description: Project results report-out: executive summary, findings, evidence, recommendations.

fields.name: report_subtitle
fields.example: What we found, what it means, and what to do next.

fields.name: author_line
fields.example: Prepared for Acme Mining · Meridian Advisory

fields.name: executive_summary
fields.example: The study validated that a phased trolley-assist transition cuts haulage cost per tonne by 14% at current diesel prices, with payback inside 30 months. The binding constraint is substation capacity at the north pit, not fleet availability.
fields.guidance: 3–5 sentence executive summary — findings first, then implication.

fields.name: findings_heading
fields.guidance: Dark divider heading for the findings chapter.

fields.name: findings_note
fields.guidance: One muted line under the divider.

fields.name: recommendations
fields.example: Commit to the phased transition starting north pit Q2 2027
fields.guidance: 3–5 recommendation bullets, ranked, with owners where known.

fields.name: conclusion_statement
fields.example: The case is made — the next 90 days decide whether the savings start in 2027

fields.name: next_steps
fields.example: Board decision on phase 1 capex — Sipho Dlamini — by 31 January
fields.guidance: 3–5 next-step bullets with owners and dates.

slide_groups.name: finding_slides
slide_groups.purpose: One finding (or finding theme) per slide, stated as an assertion with its supporting bullets.

fields.name: finding_heading
fields.example: Cost per tonne falls 14% in the phased scenario
fields.guidance: The finding as an assertion headline.

fields.name: finding_points
fields.example: Savings hold across the sensitivity range tested

slide_groups.name: evidence_slides
slide_groups.purpose: Evidence visuals — one chart image per slide. Omit the key (or pass []) for no visual slides.

fields.name: evidence_visual
fields.guidance: PNG/JPG path for this slide's image. REQUIRED: only add an evidence entry when you HAVE the file — a slide shipped with the placeholder visual fails validation.

fields.name: evidence_caption
fields.example: Simulated cost per tonne, 12-month horizon. Source: study model v2.1.

slides.name: Section divider
slides.purpose: Dark chapter break into the findings.

slides.name: Finding
slides.purpose: One finding per slide — assertion headline + supporting bullets.

slides.name: Evidence visual
slides.purpose: Chart image + source caption backing the findings.

slides.name: Closing / conclusion
slides.purpose: Single takeaway + next steps with owners and dates.
